description: Case-level expectations for the synthetic UAE offer fixtures. The eval runner still creates one row for every rule-base clause in every offer; outcomes listed here identify the primary expected findings for each case.

01_mainland_software_engineer_compliant..case_summary: Compliant mainland private-sector offer with clear salary split, leave, notice, confidentiality carve-out, and UAE law.

02_probation_notice_risk_operations_mana.case_summary: Probation and notice asymmetry risks, unclear salary split, overtime/leave gaps, and broad non-compete.

03_unclear_compensation_sales_executive..case_summary: Salary package lacks a clear basic salary and allowance split; deductions and commission terms need review.

04_leave_hours_customer_support_risk.pdf.case_summary: Working-hours, overtime, annual leave, sick leave, and employer-discretion policy risks.

05_non_compete_confidentiality_sales_dir.case_summary: Broad non-compete, non-solicit, and indefinite confidentiality restrictions for a senior sales role.

06_free_zone_jurisdiction_ambiguity_fina.case_summary: DIFC/free-zone framework and jurisdiction ambiguity, with several core terms deferred to policy or a later contract.

07_visa_relocation_repayment_marketing_s.case_summary: Visa, work permit, recruitment, and relocation repayment risk despite otherwise clear UAE employment terms.

08_brief_offer_missing_terms_consultant..case_summary: Brief offer defers most mandatory terms to future documents and policies.
